Package in.co.rays.proj4.bean

Class SystemsBean

java.lang.Object
in.co.rays.proj4.bean.BaseBean
in.co.rays.proj4.bean.SystemsBean
All Implemented Interfaces:
DropdownListBean
public class SystemsBean extends BaseBean
SystemsBean class is used as a Bean/DTO to store system event information such as event code, event name, and event status. This class extends BaseBean and provides getter and setter methods for all properties.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Vinay
